TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Blhuy2, title = Blhuy2, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Blhuy2} }

S.FORM: alang Blhuy ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 11 buwan, 43 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 86% kyan ku 37 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 14% kyan ku 6 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 84%, Bunun 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. tay 'llaw na Blhuy2 hya' ga rgyax krahu' tay 'zil na Blhuy2 hya' ga Sincyuk. tay mkyahu' na Blhuy2 hya' ga Sincyuk. tay mkraya' na Blhuy2 hya' ga Taipei.

alang Blhuy ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 11 buwan, 43 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 86% kyan ku 37 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 14% kyan ku 6 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 84%, Bunun 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. tay 'llaw na Blhuy2 hya' ga rgyax krahu' tay 'zil na Blhuy2 hya' ga Sincyuk. tay mkyahu' na Blhuy2 hya' ga Sincyuk. tay mkraya' na Blhuy2 hya' ga Taipei.
S.PHON: alaŋ βlħuj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. taj ʔllaw na βlħuj* ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ taj ʔzil na βlħuj* ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕinʦ~ʨjuk. taj mkjaħuʔ na βlħuj* ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕinʦ~ʨjuk. taj mkrajaʔ na βlħuj* ħjaʔ ɣa taipei.
